title: High-Converting Landing Page Copy
promptText: You are a conversion rate optimization specialist and direct response copywriter. Write the complete copy for a landing page that converts visitors into [CONVERSION_GOAL] for [PRODUCT_NAME], which [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Include: a headline using the 4U formula (Urgent, Unique, Ultra-specific, Useful), a subheadline that expands on the promise, a hero section with a primary CTA, three benefit blocks with icons (write the benefit headline and supporting copy for each), a social proof section with placeholder testimonial structure, an objection-handling FAQ section with 5 entries, a features-vs-benefits comparison section, a risk-reversal statement (guarantee), and a final CTA section with urgency. Write in [TONE] tone.
description: Landing page copy is where marketing strategy meets conversion psychology. This prompt generates complete page copy following proven direct response frameworks that have been A/B tested across thousands of landing pages. The 4U headline formula ensures your above-the-fold content stops scrollers. The benefit blocks, social proof, and FAQ sections address the full buyer psychology journey from awareness to trust to action. The risk-reversal guarantee removes the final conversion barrier. Use this as a complete copy brief for your designer or as a starting point for iterative testing.

variables.name: CONVERSION_GOAL
variables.description: What you want visitors to do

variables.name: PRODUCT_NAME
variables.description: Name of the product or service

variables.name: PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION
variables.example: uses AI to automatically schedule meetings across time zones, eliminating back-and-forth emails

variables.name: AUDIENCE
variables.example: remote team managers at companies with 50-500 employees

variables.name: TONE
variables.example: professional but conversational, with light humor

tips: A/B test the headline against 2-3 variations for best results
Add real testimonials to replace the placeholder structure
Use heatmap tools to track which sections get the most engagement
exampleOutput:
**Headline:** Stop Losing 5 Hours a Week to Meeting Scheduling (Your Team Deserves Better)

**Subheadline:** ScheduleGenius uses AI to find the perfect meeting time across 12 time zones in under 30 seconds. No more email ping-pong.

**Primary CTA:** Start Your Free 14-Day Trial

**Benefit Block 1:**
*Icon: Clock*
**Save 5+ Hours Per Week, Per Manager**
The average remote manager sends 23 scheduling emails per week. ScheduleGenius replaces all of them with a single AI-powered link...
metaTitle: Landing Page Copy Generator Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Write high-converting landing page copy with proven frameworks. Try this ChatGPT prompt for headlines, benefits, and CTAs that drive sign-ups.
